home.name: cuong duong
home.bio: I'm a senior engineer at SmartNews in Tokyo. Previously at Google, Zoom, and Target. I'm passionate about fostering a healthy learning culture and creating that space for everyone.
home.factGoogle: Accessibility champion + i18n on Guided Support Experience.
home.factZoom: Re-architected CI/CD and test frameworks for Zoom Events.
home.factTarget: Launched Target's first design system — 100+ apps, 3,600+ declarations.

about.title: hi, im cuong
about.subtitle: senior engineer, aspiring baker.
about.intro: i started this as a refresh of my old site and got carried away — LLMs freed up enough time that the creative side finally had room to breathe. expect some ideas here that've been (over)brewing for years. for now, make yourself at home. if you need me — i'll be <1>here</1>.
about.skillsFrontendItems: aka, making a fool of myself in front of a crowd.
about.skillsA11yItems: Most people can use stairs. Everyone can use a slope.
about.skillsAiItems: Showing people how much talent they really have.
about.skillsDsItems: Build it once, use it forever.
about.skillsCoffeeItems: Still looking for the perfect bean.
about.award2: MN State Champion — One Act Play, Forensics & Speech
about.langFr: French — knew it at one point

work.title: roles
work.subtitle: eight years, four companies, incredible role models.
work.subtitleAlt: better ingredients, better pizza. papa john's.

smartnews.scope: Cross-platform mobile work on SmartNews — React Native, Expo, and LLM-powered content pipelines.
smartnews.bullet1: Architected the React Native + Expo integration; authored team-wide development standards.
smartnews.bullet2: Built LLM-driven pipelines end-to-end, powering personalization and content relevance.
smartnews.bullet3: Mentored engineers transitioning from native iOS/Android to React Native.

google.scope: Guided Support Experience (GSE) and Help Experience Guidance.
google.bullet1: Shipped desktop implementation, accessibility readout experiments, i18n infrastructure.
google.bullet2: Primary accessibility rep; led the push to GAR4 compliance. Top A11y Contributor 2023.
google.bullet3: Founded the internal Help Experience design system + GSE component library.

zoom.scope: Zoom Events — Zoom's virtual events platform.
zoom.bullet1: Proposed and re-architected CI/CD infrastructure; measurable velocity gains.
zoom.bullet2: Introduced unit + integration testing frameworks to the core scrum project.
zoom.bullet3: Founded an internal design system; mentored interns and authored the onboarding guide.

target.scope: Guest Web Experience Platform, then API Platform and Design Systems. Pages serving 130M+ daily visits.
target.bullet1: Mitigated $6M+ in ad revenue risk via targeted code changes and expanded test coverage.
target.bullet2: Built a microsite platform that shipped a production app in 10 weeks at Target.com scale.
target.bullet3: Launch engineer on Target's first design system — 100+ apps, 3,600+ library declarations.

blog.title: writing
blog.stub: Notes on accessibility, design systems, and learning languages — programming and human. First post drafting.

notFound.body: this page doesn't exist — or never did. no worries, there are other places to wander.

layout.motifMinecraft: press F3 to see the world
layout.motifLol: time flies like an arrow. fruit flies like a banana.
